creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
I don't have a .steprc and only a minimal X config to setup NVIDIA's driver:

> Section "Device"
>	Identifier "NVIDIA Card"
>	VendorName "NVIDIA"
>	Driver "nvidia"
> EndSection

It works after I run xset +fp /usr/local/share/fonts/100dpi manually first.  For some reason it's required even though the font path already includes /usr/local/share/fonts/100dpi according to /var/log/Xorg.0.log ... But that's another mystery.

Sorry for the noise.
